name: Pork & Vegetable Soup B1
recipeIngredient: -or fileted from the rib section of loin, in the shape of a block 2 inches long
1 Piece Szechuan pickled veggy (size of an egg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice semi-frozen pork with the grain into pieces that are 1/6-inch thick and 2 inches long.
2. Neatly stack the slices in an overlapping row, ensuring that the grain of each slice is parallel to the grain of its adjacent slices.
3. Still cutting with the grain, cut pork into shreds that are 1/6-inch wide.
4. Wash the pickled vegetable under cold running water, removing all pickling material.
5. Cut the pickled vegetable into thin slices (1/6-inch wide).
6. Rinse bamboo shoot under cold running water and cut into thin lengthwise slices (1/2 inch thick).
7. Cut the bamboo shoot into shreds that are 1/6-inch thick.
8. Rinse snow peas and pull strings from their ends, then cut them into fine lengthwise shreds.
9. Heat 1 quart of water in a wok or heavy saucepan until it reaches a full rolling boil.
10. Add all the pork shreds at once to the boiling water and stir with chopsticks until they separate from each other and change color from pink to gray.
